moments.title: Tour de France reaches climax
moments.blurb: The 113th edition of the Tour de France is in its final stages, concluding on the Champs-Élysées in Paris this Sunday, July 26.

angles.name: General Excitement
angles.copy: The yellow jersey battle is heating up! Who are you backing for the win as the Tour de France heads for its grand finale this weekend? #TDF2026

angles.name: Weekend Finish
angles.copy: Sunday on the Champs-Élysées! The Tour de France is almost over for another year. What's been your highlight of the 2026 race?

moments.title: The Open Championship Recap
moments.blurb: Ryan Fox was crowned Champion Golfer of the Year at Royal Birkdale, winning the 154th Open Championship which concluded on Sunday, July 19.

angles.name: Winner's Glory
angles.copy: A huge congratulations to Ryan Fox, the Champion Golfer of the Year! What a performance at Royal Birkdale for The Open Championship.

angles.name: Best Moments
angles.copy: Still buzzing from The Open? Ryan Fox took the Claret Jug, but what was your favourite moment from Royal Birkdale last weekend?

moments.title: Latitude Festival kicks off
moments.blurb: Latitude Festival returns to Henham Park, Suffolk from July 23-26, featuring headliners David Byrne, Teddy Swims, and Lewis Capaldi.

angles.name: Opening Day Excitement
angles.copy: It's almost time! Latitude Festival kicks off tomorrow in Henham Park. Who are you most excited to see this weekend?

angles.name: Headliners Shoutout
angles.copy: David Byrne, Teddy Swims, Lewis Capaldi... the Latitude Festival lineup is stacked! Who's heading to Suffolk this weekend?

moments.title: Together Again Festival this weekend
moments.blurb: The Together Again Festival is set for July 24-26 at Bolesworth Castle in Cheshire, promising a weekend of music, arts, and culture.

angles.name: Cheshire Festival Vibes
angles.copy: Get ready, Cheshire! Together Again Festival starts Friday at Bolesworth Castle. Who's got their tickets ready?

angles.name: Weekend Plans
angles.copy: Music, arts, culture... Together Again Festival is bringing it all to Bolesworth Castle this weekend. What's on your must-see list?

moments.title: Bruno Mars continues Wembley residency
moments.blurb: Bruno Mars is performing multiple dates at Wembley Stadium in London, including tonight, July 22, and again on July 24 and 25.

angles.name: Tonight's Show
angles.copy: London, are you ready? Bruno Mars is at Wembley Stadium tonight! Who's heading out to see the Hooligans?

angles.name: Wembley Weekend
angles.copy: Still got chances to catch Bruno Mars at Wembley this week! What's your favourite Bruno Mars track to hear live?

moments.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
moments.blurb: The iconic frontman of The Rolling Stones, Mick Jagger, celebrates his 83rd birthday on Saturday, July 26.

angles.name: Rock Legend
angles.copy: Still rolling! On Saturday, Mick Jagger turns 83. What's your ultimate Stones anthem?

angles.name: Birthday Shoutout
angles.copy: Happy 83rd birthday to the one and only Mick Jagger this Saturday! The energy is still unreal.

moments.title: Roger Taylor turns 77
moments.blurb: Queen's legendary drummer, Roger Taylor, will celebrate his 77th birthday on Saturday, July 26.

angles.name: Drumming Icon
angles.copy: Another rock icon celebrating a birthday this weekend! Roger Taylor of Queen turns 77 on Saturday. Which Queen track showcases his drumming best?

angles.name: Queen's Beat
angles.copy: Sending early birthday wishes to the incredible Roger Taylor, who turns 77 this Saturday! What's your favourite Queen song?

moments.title: Geddy Lee turns 73
moments.blurb: Rush's influential bassist and vocalist, Geddy Lee, celebrates his 73rd birthday on Tuesday, July 29.

angles.name: Prog Rock Legend
angles.copy: Happy 73rd birthday to the legendary Geddy Lee of Rush this Tuesday! What's your favourite Rush album?

angles.name: Bass Hero
angles.copy: Celebrating Geddy Lee's 73rd birthday on July 29! The voice and bass of Rush are truly iconic.

moments.title: David Essex turns 79
moments.blurb: British singer and actor David Essex celebrates his 79th birthday tomorrow, July 23.

angles.name: 70s Icon
angles.copy: Happy 79th birthday to the one and only David Essex tomorrow! 'Rock On' is still a classic.

angles.name: Musical Star
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 79th birthday to David Essex this Thursday! What's your favourite song or role from his career?

moments.title: Michelle Williams turns 46
moments.blurb: Grammy-winning singer Michelle Williams, best known as a member of Destiny's Child, celebrates her 46th birthday tomorrow, July 23.

angles.name: Destiny's Child Star
angles.copy: Happy 46th birthday to Michelle Williams from Destiny's Child tomorrow! Which DC track is your ultimate favourite?

angles.name: Birthday Vibes
angles.copy: Celebrating Michelle Williams' 46th birthday this Thursday! From Destiny's Child to solo success, a true talent.

moments.title: Alison Krauss turns 55
moments.blurb: Grammy-winning bluegrass and country singer Alison Krauss celebrates her 55th birthday tomorrow, July 23.

angles.name: Country Queen
angles.copy: Happy 55th birthday to the incredible Alison Krauss tomorrow! Her voice is pure magic. What's your favourite of her songs?

angles.name: Timeless Talent
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 55th birthday to the phenomenal Alison Krauss this Thursday! A true gem in music.

moments.title: Slash turns 61
moments.blurb: Guns N' Roses lead guitarist Slash celebrates his 61st birthday tomorrow, July 23.

angles.name: Guitar God
angles.copy: Tomorrow, the legendary Slash turns 61! What's your favourite Guns N' Roses guitar solo?

angles.name: Rock Icon
angles.copy: Happy 61st birthday to the one and only Slash this Thursday! The riff master himself.

moments.title: Martin Gore turns 65
moments.blurb: Depeche Mode's co-founder, songwriter, and guitarist, Martin Gore, celebrates his 65th birthday tomorrow, July 23.

angles.name: Synth Pop Pioneer
angles.copy: Happy 65th birthday to Martin Gore of Depeche Mode tomorrow! Which of his songs is your all-time favourite?

angles.name: Depeche Mode Mastermind
angles.copy: Celebrating Martin Gore's 65th birthday this Thursday! The creative force behind so many Depeche Mode hits.

moments.title: UK Schools break for summer
moments.blurb: Schools across England and Wales are breaking up this week for the summer holidays, with many already finished by today, July 22.

angles.name: School's Out
angles.copy: That's it for another year! Schools across England and Wales are officially on summer break. What are your plans for the holidays?

angles.name: Family Fun
angles.copy: The summer holidays are here! Wishing all the families a fantastic break. What are you looking forward to most?
